title: Abercrombie & Fitch Blouse — White

enhanced_description:
Abercrombie & Fitch Madame Blouse — White
Brand: Abercrombie & Fitch
Size: M
Condition: Gently Used
Composition: 100% Cotton
Color: White

Measurements (Laid Flat):
Pit-to-Pit: 39cm
Length: 59cm

About the Piece
This vintage-inspired white blouse brings a touch of classic elegance with its intricate floral embroidery and delicate lace bodice. The sheer sleeves add a feminine flair, while the ruffled hem gives it a playful yet polished silhouette perfect for layering or wearing on its own.

Style Note: Romantic & Vintage Chic

Key Detail: Embroidered moose logo on the hem; visible frayed edges and slight discoloration consistent with vintage wear (see photos).

Seller Notes
Shipping: 🚀 Next day shipping guaranteed!

Shop My Closet: Check out my other offers for more Abercrombie & Fitch items—I'm happy to offer bundle discounts if you see something else you like!

Questions? Drop a comment or send an offer. I'm responsive and ready to ship.
